THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICARDO, LISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALIOTO, ANNA ALIOTO, GAETANO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2160 MASON STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL JUN-30-2005, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH; STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION THROUGH 6/30/05. PLTF WAIVES ALL BACK RENT AND DAILY UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMGES THROUGH 6/30/05 PROVIDED DEFENDANTS COMPLY WITH THE TERMS. ADDITIONAL TERMS IN JUDGMENT.
